AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种结合高通量第一性原理计算、磁力理论和自旋哈密顿量分析的新策略，从15万种材料数据库中筛选出具有竞争交换相互作用和新型磁态的候选材料，重点关注kagome和三角晶格，发现了6种有前景的新型磁性材料。
AI.motivation: 几何阻挫是实现量子自旋液体等奇异相的有力途径，但针对特定阻挫基元及其承载非常规磁基态潜力的系统性搜索仍然很少，需要更聚焦和预测性的材料发现方法。
AI.method: 结合高通量第一性原理计算、磁力理论和自旋哈密顿量分析的新策略，从15万种材料数据库中筛选候选材料，重点关注kagome和三角晶格，通过工作流程验证已知阻挫磁性材料并预测新型候选化合物。
AI.result: 工作流程不仅重现了大多数已知阻挫磁性材料，验证了方法的有效性，还预测了尚未实验合成的新型候选化合物。识别出6种有前景的新材料：1种三角晶格化合物KMgNiIO6和5种kagome晶格化合物（Li4Fe3WO8、Li2V3F8、Li5VP2(O4F)2和Li2MgCo3O8的两种相）。
AI.conclusion: 该策略为发现具有特定阻挫特征的新型磁性材料提供了系统方法，预测的候选材料可能承载由其独特阻挫特性驱动的全新磁相，为实验合成和进一步研究提供了明确目标。

title: Optimized growth of large-size, high quality $\text{ZrTe}_5$ single crystals enabling clear quantum oscillations in electrical transport
summary: Quantum oscillation with nontrivial Berry phase is one of the characteristics of topological materials. As a Dirac semimetal candidate, zirconium pentatelluride ($\text{ZrTe}_5$) stands out as an intriguing material for investigating topological phase transitions and Dirac fermion physics; however, the extreme sensitivity of its electronic properties to stoichiometric variations and crystalline defects has hindered consistent experimental observation. Here, we report an optimized Te-flux synthesis method designed to produce centimeter-scale, high-quality single crystals meanwhile minimizing extrinsic carrier contamination. Comprehensive morphology, structural and chemical characterization, including scanning electron microscopy, Laue backscattering and Rietveld refinement, confirms a high-purity $Cmcm$ phase with excellent crystallinity. Furthermore, magnetotransport measurements reveal a remarkably low Shubnikov-de Haas oscillation onset field ($B \approx 0.38$ T) and access to the the quantum limit at $B \approx 1.3$ T, indicative of low carrier density and high carrier mobility. These results demonstrate that growth control is crucial for stabilizing intrinsic electronic behavior in $\text{ZrTe}_5$, establishing a robust platform for exploring topological phase transitions and exotic quantum phenomena in topological semimetals.

AI.tldr: 通过优化的Te-flux合成方法制备高质量ZrTe₅单晶，实现低载流子密度和高迁移率，为研究拓扑相变和狄拉克费米子物理提供可靠平台
AI.motivation: ZrTe₅作为狄拉克半金属候选材料，其电子性质对化学计量比和晶体缺陷极为敏感，导致实验观测不一致，需要开发可靠的晶体生长方法来稳定其本征电子行为
AI.method: 采用优化的Te-flux合成方法制备厘米级高质量单晶，通过扫描电镜、Laue背散射和Rietveld精修进行形貌、结构和化学表征，并进行磁输运测量
AI.result: 成功制备出高纯度Cmcm相ZrTe₅单晶，具有优异结晶性；磁输运测量显示极低的SdH振荡起始磁场（B≈0.38 T）和量子极限可达B≈1.3 T，表明低载流子密度和高迁移率
AI.conclusion: 生长控制对稳定ZrTe₅的本征电子行为至关重要，建立的可靠平台为探索拓扑半金属中的拓扑相变和奇异量子现象奠定了基础

title: Noise-protected two-qubit gate using anisotropic exchange interaction
summary: Hole spin qubits hosted in Germanium quantum dots are promising candidates for scalable quantum computing. The strong spin-orbit interaction can enable fast and all-electrical quantum control. Furthermore, the platform can implement universal quantum control using only baseband signals, which may mitigate the impact of crosstalk and microwave-induced heating. At the same time, spin-orbit interaction gives rise to an anisotropic exchange interaction, whose potential for implementing two-qubit gates has remained largely unexplored. However, the current performance of operating a hole-based quantum computer is mostly limited by dephasing due to low-frequency charge noise. In this work, we propose a novel two-qubit gate protocol for Germanium hole spin qubits operated in the gapless regime. This gate protocol exploits the anisotropic exchange interaction between neighboring spins and utilizes a composite pulse scheme implemented solely through electrical baseband signals. Using this approach, we predict high-fidelity two-qubit controlled-Z operations that can suppress exchange-energy fluctuations, offering a pathway toward fault-tolerant semiconductor quantum processors.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于锗空穴自旋量子比特的新型两量子比特门协议，利用各向异性交换相互作用和复合脉冲方案，通过基带电信号实现高保真度受控Z操作。
AI.motivation: 锗空穴自旋量子比特在可扩展量子计算中具有潜力，但当前性能受低频电荷噪声导致的退相干限制。各向异性交换相互作用在两量子比特门实现中的潜力尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 提出一种新型两量子比特门协议，在无间隙区操作锗空穴自旋量子比特，利用相邻自旋间的各向异性交换相互作用，采用复合脉冲方案，仅通过电基带信号实现。
AI.result: 预测能够抑制交换能量波动的高保真度两量子比特受控Z操作，为容错半导体量子处理器提供途径。
AI.conclusion: 该协议利用锗空穴自旋量子比特的各向异性交换相互作用，通过基带电信号实现高保真度两量子比特门，有望克服电荷噪声限制，推动半导体量子计算发展。

title: Many-body correlations in Floquet steady-states: Frequency-resolved renormalization group of the driven Anderson impurity
summary: We introduce a functional renormalization group framework formulated directly in the Floquet steady-state that systematically incorporates frequency-dependent interaction effects. By retaining the frequency structure of the two-particle vertex up to second order in interaction strength, our approach provides controlled access to dynamical response functions and nonequilibrium transport in driven, interacting systems. Using the periodically driven single-impurity Anderson model as a paradigmatic example, we benchmark our results against state-of-the-art Floquet Green's function methods and find quantitative agreement for finite-frequency observables up to intermediate interaction strengths. Remarkably, we also show that static properties are often captured reliably by much simpler approximations, suggesting practical pathways for modeling driven quantum materials. Finally, we demonstrate that although periodic driving of the dot strongly broadens the Kondo resonance through inelastic scattering, it leaves the many-body Kondo cloud largely intact. This robustness suppresses Floquet replicas of the Kondo peak and leads to a partial persistence of Kondo pinning, highlighting the resilience of emergent many-body correlations under local periodic driving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种直接在Floquet稳态中构建的功能重整化群框架，系统性地包含了频率相关的相互作用效应，为研究驱动相互作用系统的动力学响应和非平衡输运提供了受控方法。
AI.motivation: 研究周期性驱动相互作用系统的非平衡动力学响应和输运性质，特别是需要系统性地处理频率相关的相互作用效应，现有方法在有限频率可观测量的计算上存在局限。
AI.method: 开发了直接在Floquet稳态中构建的功能重整化群框架，保留二阶相互作用强度的双粒子顶点的频率结构，以周期性驱动的单杂质Anderson模型作为范例系统。
AI.result: 与最先进的Floquet格林函数方法在有限频率可观测量上达到定量一致（至中等相互作用强度）；静态性质可由更简单近似可靠描述；周期性驱动虽展宽Kondo共振但Kondo云基本保持完整，抑制了Kondo峰的Floquet复制并导致Kondo钉扎的部分持续。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为模拟驱动量子材料提供了实用途径，并揭示了在局域周期性驱动下涌现的多体关联具有显著的鲁棒性，Kondo云结构能够抵抗驱动引起的非弹性散射。

title: Characterization of Exciton-exciton entanglement and correlations
summary: Excitons in the weakly interacting regime can be well-described by many-body perturbation theories such as the Bethe-Salpeter equation formalism. However, for materials such as transition metal dichalcogenides moiré heterostructures under strong illumination, with the emergence of dense excitonic states, the strong correlation and entanglement between electrons and holes may cause the many-body perturbation method to fail, and excitons may not be treated in the bosonic picture, but exhibit fermionic behaviors. In our work, we investigate the phase space where excitons, and the electrons and holes which constitute them, are weakly or strongly entangled, as well as their binding for different interaction profiles and the degree of localization of the electrons and holes. We corroborate the validity of using many-body perturbation theory in the exciton with interactions. Our work provides a general way to analyze the correlation and entanglement of multi-particle excitations in many-body systems, and gives a more comprehensive understanding of different phases for exciton entanglement and interactions in 1D systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了激子系统中电子-空穴纠缠的强弱相变，分析了不同相互作用和局域化程度下激子的行为，验证了多体微扰理论在激子相互作用中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在过渡金属二硫化物莫尔异质结等强光照条件下，密集激子态的出现导致电子-空穴强关联和纠缠，可能使传统多体微扰方法失效，激子可能表现出费米子行为而非玻色子行为。
AI.method: 研究激子及其构成电子-空穴在不同相互作用势和局域化程度下的弱/强纠缠相空间，分析激子结合能，验证多体微扰理论在激子相互作用中的适用性。
AI.result: 确定了激子系统中电子-空穴纠缠的强弱相变区域，验证了多体微扰理论在激子相互作用中的有效性，为分析多体系统中多粒子激发的关联和纠缠提供了通用方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为分析多体系统中多粒子激发的关联和纠缠提供了通用框架，对一维系统中激子纠缠和相互作用的不同相给出了更全面的理解。

title: Imaging the high-frequency charging dynamics of a single impurity in a semiconductor on the atomic scale
summary: As electronic devices approach the atomic limit, the charge dynamics of individual dopant atoms increasingly constrain performance, stability, and coherence. In scanning tunnelling microscopy (STM), donor ionization is typically interpreted as a static threshold process arising from tip-induced band bending. Here we show that the ionization of individual sulfur donors in InAs is intrinsically dynamic and governed by the local electric field. Using MHz-frequency STM noise spectroscopy with atomic-scale spatial mapping, we resolve pronounced random telegraph noise that is invisible in time-averaged tunnelling spectra. A bias-dependent model quantitatively links the noise spectra to microscopic ionization and neutralization processes of the donor states, enabling direct extraction of nanosecond charge-state lifetimes. The switching rate is strongly bias dependent, demonstrating that the electric field continuously drives charge-state transitions. Unexpectedly, we show that the degenerately doped bulk leads to a sharp bias-dependent onset of donor ionization as the donor level crosses the Fermi level, giving rise to a characteristic shoulder in the noise power spectrum that is captured by our model. These results establish donor ionization as a non-equilibrium dynamical process with nontrivial contribution by the bulk electrons, and identify impurity switching as a universal nanoscale charge-noise mechanism relevant to quantum devices.

AI.tldr: 使用MHz频率STM噪声光谱技术，在原子尺度上观测到单个硫掺杂剂在InAs中的动态电离过程，发现电荷态转换受局部电场驱动，揭示了掺杂剂电离作为非平衡动力学过程的新机制。
AI.motivation: 随着电子器件接近原子极限，单个掺杂原子的电荷动力学对性能、稳定性和相干性的影响日益重要。传统STM将掺杂剂电离解释为静态阈值过程，但实际可能涉及更复杂的动态机制。
AI.method: 采用MHz频率扫描隧道显微镜（STM）噪声光谱技术，结合原子级空间映射，分析单个硫掺杂剂在InAs中的随机电报噪声。建立偏压依赖模型，将噪声谱与掺杂剂态的微观电离和中性化过程定量关联。
AI.result: 观测到时间平均隧道谱中不可见的显著随机电报噪声，直接提取出纳秒级电荷态寿命。开关速率强烈依赖偏压，表明电场持续驱动电荷态转换。发现高掺杂体导致掺杂剂能级跨越费米能级时出现尖锐的偏压依赖电离起始，在噪声功率谱中产生特征肩峰。
AI.conclusion: 掺杂剂电离是非平衡动力学过程，体电子在其中起重要作用。杂质开关是量子器件中普遍存在的纳米级电荷噪声机制，对器件性能有重要影响。

title: Tutorial: Heat Capacity-A Powerful Tool for Studying Exotic States of Matter
summary: Heat capacity measurements are a powerful tool that researchers rely on when studying the relationship between microscopic degrees of freedom and macroscopic behavior in condensed matter. This uniqueness stems from heat capacity capturing contributions from lattice, electronic, and magnetic components, as well as energy-level populations, enabling an effective approach to studying phase transitions and excitations across different classes of materials. However, analyzing heat capacity data presents a common, appreciable challenge for new researchers. Although comprehensive theoretical aspects of heat capacity are presented in several elegant textbooks, practical application remains a daunting task. To overcome this challenge, this tutorial guides researchers in collecting, analyzing, and interpreting heat capacity data in contemporary quantum materials. We outline the connections between thermodynamics, heat capacity, and entropy, as well as measurement methodology and data analysis for representative examples, including phonon dynamics, spin waves, superconductors, magnetic skyrmions, proximate quantum spin liquids, and heavy-fermion materials. Our goal is to provide a concise, accessible guide that enables new researchers to utilize heat capacity as a quantitative lens for understanding exotic states of matter.

AI.tldr: 这是一篇关于热容测量在量子材料研究中应用的教程性论文，旨在帮助研究人员收集、分析和解释热容数据。
AI.motivation: 热容测量是研究凝聚态物质微观自由度与宏观行为关系的有力工具，但分析热容数据对新研究人员来说具有相当大的挑战性。虽然理论方面已有教科书阐述，但实际应用仍然困难。
AI.method: 论文提供了热容测量的实用教程，包括热力学、热容和熵之间的联系，测量方法学，以及针对代表性材料的数据分析示例，涵盖声子动力学、自旋波、超导体、磁性斯格明子、近邻量子自旋液体和重费米子材料。
AI.result: 论文提供了一个简洁、易懂的指南，使新研究人员能够将热容作为理解奇异物质状态的定量工具。
AI.conclusion: 该教程旨在帮助研究人员克服热容数据分析的挑战，有效利用热容测量来研究当代量子材料中的相变和激发。

title: Quantifying Perovskite Solar Cell Degradation via Machine Learning from Spatially Resolved Multimodal Luminescence Time Series
summary: Perovskite solar cells (PSCs) have experienced a remarkable rise in power conversion efficiency (PCE) over the past 15 years, positioning them as a promising alternative or complement to silicon for large-scale photovoltaic deployment. However, beyond scalable fabrication, operational stability remains a major bottleneck for commercialization. Reliable and rapid methods to assess device health and degradation mechanisms - ideally compatible with field applications - are therefore essential. We present a deep-learning framework to estimate efficiency retention, $R_\mathrm{PCE}=\mathrm{PCE}_t/\mathrm{PCE}_0$, directly from multimodal luminescence imaging acquired during device aging. Each training sample includes electroluminescence (EL), open-circuit photoluminescence (PLoc), and short-circuit photoluminescence (PLsc) images at an aged state, together with device-specific reference images at $t=0$. This design enables the model to learn spatially resolved degradation patterns relative to the pristine condition. The dataset was collected over 5-70 hours using an automated, in-house measurement platform. We introduce LumPerNet, a compact convolutional neural network that regresses $R_\mathrm{PCE}$ from stacked multimodal image tensors, and benchmark it against an intensity-only multilayer perceptron baseline. Using a leakage-aware protocol with device-level hold-out testing and four-fold cross-validation, restricted to $R_\mathrm{PCE}\in[0.8,1.2]$, LumPerNet achieves substantially improved and more robust performance (MAE -23.4%, RMSE -25.6%, $R^2$ +0.417). Ablation studies highlight the importance of complementary physical contrast across modalities for generalization. Overall, this work establishes a reproducible pipeline linking automated luminescence imaging to electrical labels, enabling accelerated stability testing and non-invasive degradation monitoring in PSCs.

AI.tldr: 开发深度学习框架LumPerNet，通过多模态发光成像（EL、PLoc、PLsc）直接估计钙钛矿太阳能电池的效率保持率，实现非侵入式降解监测和加速稳定性测试。
AI.motivation: 钙钛矿太阳能电池效率提升迅速，但操作稳定性是商业化的主要瓶颈。需要可靠快速的方法评估设备健康和降解机制，最好能兼容现场应用。
AI.method: 提出深度学习框架LumPerNet，使用紧凑卷积神经网络从堆叠的多模态图像张量回归效率保持率。数据集通过自动化测量平台收集5-70小时老化数据，包含EL、PLoc、PLsc图像及t=0参考图像。
AI.result: LumPerNet在设备级留出测试和四折交叉验证中表现显著优于基线（MAE降低23.4%，RMSE降低25.6%，R²提高0.417）。消融研究显示多模态互补物理对比对泛化能力至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可重复的自动化发光成像与电学标签关联管道，实现了钙钛矿太阳能电池的加速稳定性测试和非侵入式降解监测。

title: Extending Topological Bound on Quantum Weight Beyond Symmetry-Protected Topological Phases
summary: The quantum metric encodes the geometric structure of Bloch wave functions and governs a wide range of physical responses. Its Brillouin-zone integral, the quantum weight, appears in the structure factor and provides lower bounds on observables such as the optical gap and dielectric constant. In symmetry-protected topological (SPT) phases, the nontrivial band topology imposes a lower bound on the quantum weight and constraints on the observables. Here, we generalize the topological bound on quantum geometry to encompass systems beyond the SPT phases. We show that topological invariants defined via the projected spectrum lower-bound the quantum weight with a symmetry-breaking correction to the quantum metric. Our proposed bound holds even when the underlying symmetries are broken, and it would be amenable to experimental verification via the optical conductivity sum rule under external fields. We illustrate our theory by adding a nonzero spin-orbit coupling term to a spin Chern insulator model, where we show that our proposed bound applies even though the conventional topological bound does not hold.

AI.tldr: 量子几何度量在拓扑系统中存在下界，该下界由拓扑不变量决定，即使对称性破缺时依然成立
AI.motivation: 量子度量编码了布洛赫波函数的几何结构，其布里渊区积分（量子权重）出现在结构因子中，并为光学带隙和介电常数等可观测量提供下界。在对称性保护的拓扑相中，非平凡的能带拓扑对量子权重施加了下界。然而，需要将这种拓扑下界推广到超出SPT相的系统。
AI.method: 通过投影谱定义的拓扑不变量来下界量子权重，并引入对称性破缺修正项到量子度量中。该方法即使在底层对称性破缺时也成立，并可通过外部场下的光学电导率求和规则进行实验验证。
AI.result: 在自旋陈绝缘体模型中添加非零的自旋轨道耦合项，展示了所提出的下界适用，而传统的拓扑下界不成立。这表明拓扑不变量确实能够下界量子权重，即使对称性破缺时依然有效。
AI.conclusion: 成功将拓扑下界推广到超出对称性保护拓扑相的系统，建立了拓扑不变量与量子几何度量之间的普适关系，为实验验证提供了可行途径。

title: Orbital dimerization-induced first-order structural phase transition: a case study in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$
summary: First-order structural phase transition is a common phenomenon in materials that qualitatively alters their physical properties. Yet, the abrupt first-order nature is usually unexplained by realistic computations, implying an omission of important physics in describing the electronic structure of the nearby stable phases. Using the recently discovered nickelate superconductors La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ as a prototypical example, we demonstrate that such first-order nature is typically beyond intra-atomic correlation considered in state-of-the-art material computations. Instead, a full many-body treatment of low-energy active orbitals reveals a generic inter-atomic "orbital dimerization" mechanism of first-order structural phase transition, corresponding to abrupt energy reduction upon a spin-singlet bond formation. Such an inter-atomic correlation qualitatively changes not only the essential lattice bonding but also the characteristics of low-energy electronic properties across the transition. This strong mechanism and the developed computational framework are generally applicable to a wide variety of ionic materials, to produce valuable insights into atomic and electronic structures essential for their physical properties and functionalities.

AI.tldr: 论文揭示了离子材料中一阶结构相变的通用机制——原子间"轨道二聚化"，并通过镍酸盐超导体La₃Ni₂O₇验证了该机制，超越了传统计算中仅考虑原子内关联的局限。
AI.motivation: 一阶结构相变在材料中普遍存在，能显著改变物理性质，但传统计算通常无法解释其突变特性，这表明在描述相邻稳定相的电子结构时忽略了重要物理机制。
AI.method: 以新发现的镍酸盐超导体La₃Ni₂O₇为原型，采用全多体方法处理低能活性轨道，揭示原子间"轨道二聚化"机制，对应自旋单态键形成时的能量骤降。
AI.result: 原子间关联不仅从根本上改变了晶格键合特性，还显著影响了跨越相变的低能电子性质特征，为理解一阶结构相变提供了新视角。
AI.conclusion: 这种强机制和开发的计算框架广泛适用于各类离子材料，为理解其原子和电子结构提供了重要见解，这些结构对其物理性质和功能至关重要。

title: Magnetic-field-induced magnon portfolio in a van der Waals magnet
comment: Supplemental material will be available upon request
summary: Magnonic excitations are investigated in chromium oxychloride (CrOCl), a van der Waal (vdW) antiferromagnet prone to a multitude of magnetic phase transitions, with absorption experiments in a broad continuous energy range. At low magnetic fields, the magnon spectra show a strong bi-axial anisotropy and inform on the relative weights of the effective exchange coupling and the system anisotropies. As the magnetic field increases, magnons characteristic of a canted phase are first observed, with peculiarities attributed to in-plane anisotropies and magnon-magnon coupling. Subsequently, a hysteretic magnon spectrum appears as the system transitions to a ferrimagnetic state, with two new magnon branches partly coexisting with the lower energy canted phase branch, indicating the formation of spatially separated magnetic phases. Further changes in the magnon spectrum in higher magnetic fields accompany transitions to the different canted magnetic phases previously reported. Our experiments show that competing exchange interactions and ground states broaden the options to generate different kinds of magnonic excitations in the same vdW material upon the variation of external parameters.

AI.tldr: 研究了CrOCl中的磁振子激发，发现该vdW反铁磁体在不同磁场下呈现多种磁相变，产生不同类型的磁振子激发。
AI.motivation: 探索vdW材料CrOCl中的磁振子激发，理解其在多种磁相变中的行为，以及竞争交换相互作用如何影响磁振子特性。
AI.method: 在宽连续能量范围内进行吸收实验，研究不同磁场下CrOCl的磁振子光谱，分析各磁相中的激发特性。
AI.result: 低场下观察到强双轴各向异性磁振子；随磁场增加，先出现倾斜相磁振子，随后出现滞后磁振子谱，表明铁磁态形成；更高场下伴随不同倾斜磁相转变。
AI.conclusion: 竞争交换相互作用和基态扩展了在同一vdW材料中通过外部参数变化产生不同类型磁振子激发的可能性。

title: A Straight Forward Method to Read the Nuclear Qudit of $4f$ Single-Molecule Magnets : $^{163}$DyPc$_2$
summary: Nuclear spins in $4f$ single-molecule magnets (SMMs) are promising qubits or qudits candidates for quantum information processing due to their relative isolation and reduced susceptibility to environmental disturbances, while hyperfine coupling with the $4f$ moments enables readout and control. So far, the nuclear spin states of individual TbPc$_2$ SMMs have been detected in transport measurements via the spin-cascade effect, in which transitions of the Tb$^{3+}$ magnetic moment coupled to the unpaired ligand electron manifest as conductance jumps in spin-polarized transport. The ligand electron also gives rise to a Kondo effect through its interaction with the metallic contacts. By sweeping a magnetic field along the easy axis of the Tb$^{3+}$ moment, the system is tuned to avoided crossings of the hyperfine levels, such that the magnetic field at which the conductance jumps occur indicates the nuclear spin state. Here, we present a method to read the nuclear spin of $^{163}$DyPc$_2$ ($I=5/2$) using millikelvin spin-polarized scanning tunneling microscopy without the need for magnetic-field sweeps. Instead, hyperfine interactions modify the statistics of the telegraph noise generated by reversals of the Dy$^{3+}$ moment, thereby revealing the nuclear spin state. We observe nuclear spin relaxation times $T_1$ in excess of minutes at \SI{35}{mK}. Furthermore, we drive nuclear spin transitions using a radio-frequency field and detect the resulting nuclear magnetic resonance directly in the tunneling current, as the conductance near the split Kondo peaks depends on the nuclear spin state.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种无需磁场扫描即可读取163DyPc2单分子磁体核自旋状态的新方法，利用超精细相互作用改变电报噪声统计特性，并实现了核磁共振检测。
AI.motivation: 4f单分子磁体中的核自旋因其相对孤立性和对环境干扰的较低敏感性，是量子信息处理中量子比特/量子dit的有力候选者。传统方法需要磁场扫描来检测核自旋状态，本研究旨在开发更简便的检测方法。
AI.method: 使用毫开尔文温度下的自旋极化扫描隧道显微镜，通过分析Dy³⁺磁矩反转产生的电报噪声统计特性来读取核自旋状态。利用超精细相互作用改变噪声特性，并通过射频场驱动核自旋跃迁，在隧穿电流中直接检测核磁共振信号。
AI.result: 成功实现了无需磁场扫描的核自旋状态读取，观察到在35mK温度下核自旋弛豫时间T1超过分钟量级。通过射频场驱动核自旋跃迁，在分裂的Kondo峰附近的电导中检测到核磁共振信号，证实了电导对核自旋状态的依赖性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究开发了一种新颖的核自旋读取方法，避免了传统磁场扫描的需求，为单分子磁体中核自旋作为量子信息载体的应用提供了更实用的检测技术，展示了在毫开尔文温度下核自旋的长弛豫时间和可控性。

title: Data-efficient surrogate modeling of spectral functions using Gaussian processes: An application to the $t$-$t'$-$t''$-$J$ model
summary: Spectral functions encode key many-body information but are costly to compute with high fidelity. Machine-learning surrogates have emerged as a powerful alternative, yet many approaches require large training datasets. We develop a data-efficient surrogate for spectral functions using the $t$-$t'$-$t''$-$J$ model, which describes the motion of a hole in a quantum antiferromagnet. Using $\sim$ 10$^5$ self-consistent Born approximation-based spectra from Lee, Carbone and Yin (Phys. Rev. B 107, 205132 (2023)), we train a deep-kernel Gaussian process surrogate model with sparse variational inference (DKL-SVGP) using only 10% of the available training spectra. We benchmark against feed-forward neural networks (FFNN) trained on the same reduced subset and on the full dataset. The proposed DKL-SVGP model consistently outperforms the reduced-data FFNN and, despite using only 10% of the training spectra, achieves spectrum-wise errors within the same order-of-magnitude as the full-data FFNN baseline. Worst-tail diagnostics show improved fidelity on difficult spectra, while peak-level analysis indicates that DKL-SVGP recovers dominant peak heights with comparable accuracy and improves peak-location agreement under a matched-peak evaluation that mitigates rare peak-swapping cases. Overall, these results highlight GP-based surrogates as a competitive and data-efficient approach for spectral-function prediction in scarce-data regimes.

AI.tldr: 使用深度核高斯过程替代模型，仅需10%训练数据即可高效预测光谱函数，性能接近使用全数据训练的神经网络基线。
AI.motivation: 光谱函数包含重要的多体信息，但高保真计算成本高昂。机器学习替代模型虽强大，但通常需要大量训练数据。本研究旨在开发数据高效的替代模型，解决稀缺数据场景下的光谱函数预测问题。
AI.method: 基于t-t'-t''-J模型（描述量子反铁磁体中空穴运动），使用约10^5个自洽玻恩近似光谱数据，训练深度核高斯过程替代模型（DKL-SVGP），采用稀疏变分推断，仅使用10%的训练光谱。与在相同减少数据集和全数据集上训练的前馈神经网络（FFNN）进行基准比较。
AI.result: DKL-SVGP模型在减少数据集上始终优于FFNN，尽管仅使用10%训练光谱，其光谱级误差与全数据FFNN基线处于同一数量级。最差尾部诊断显示在困难光谱上保真度提高，峰值分析表明DKL-SVGP能准确恢复主导峰值高度，并在匹配峰值评估中改善峰值位置一致性。
AI.conclusion: 高斯过程替代模型在稀缺数据场景下是竞争性强且数据高效的光谱函数预测方法，为多体物理中的光谱函数计算提供了有前景的替代方案。

title: Neutron-enhanced ion transport in cathode coating of Li-ion batteries
comment: 36 pages, 8 figures, APS Global Physics Summit, Denver, CO, March 15-20,2026
summary: Polycrystalline solid-state ionic conductors (PolySSICs) are key energy materials for all-solid-state Li-ion batteries (LIBs). However, achieving room-temperature ionic conductivity comparable to that of liquid electrolytes ($σ\sim 10^{-2}-10\,\mathrm{S\cdot cm^{-1}}$) remains a major challenge. Here, we experimentally demonstrate that thermal neutron irradiation provides an effective strategy for engineering ion transport in a model PolySSIC, LiBO$_2$, a promising electrode coating material for LIBs. High-flux ($\sim 10^{9}$ neutrons$\cdot$cm$^{-2}\cdot$s$^{-1}$) thermal neutrons ($\sim 25$ meV), delivered at Beam Port E of the University of Missouri Research Reactor (MURR), selectively transmute the strong neutron absorbers $^{10}\mathrm{B}$ and $^{6}\mathrm{Li}$ at their natural abundances ($\sim19.9\%$ and $\sim7.5\%$). This process generates lattice vacancies within polycrystalline grains while preserving long-range crystallographic order. In addition, $γ$ photons produced during $^{10}$B transmutation release electrons that suppress atomic displacement and partially neutralize the space charge associated with positively charged oxygen vacancies at grain boundaries. As a result, the ionic conductivity increases by nearly $20\%$ in grains and more than $80\%$ at grain boundaries. These results validate theoretical predictions and demonstrate a controllable strategy for enhancing ion transport in PolySSICs for solid ionic devices, including LIBs.

AI.tldr: 热中子辐照可显著提升多晶固态离子导体LiBO₂的离子电导率，晶粒内增加近20%，晶界处增加超80%
AI.motivation: 多晶固态离子导体是实现全固态锂离子电池的关键材料，但其室温离子电导率远低于液态电解质，需要开发有效的离子传输增强策略
AI.method: 使用密苏里大学研究反应堆的高通量热中子辐照LiBO₂样品，通过选择性嬗变¹⁰B和⁶Li产生晶格空位，同时利用γ光子释放电子抑制原子位移并中和晶界空间电荷
AI.result: 热中子辐照后，LiBO₂的离子电导率显著提升：晶粒内增加近20%，晶界处增加超过80%，验证了理论预测
AI.conclusion: 热中子辐照是一种可控且有效的策略，可用于增强多晶固态离子导体的离子传输性能，为固态离子器件（包括锂离子电池）的材料工程提供了新途径

title: Topological electric field-defined quantum dots in bilayer graphene: An atomistic approach
summary: We study topological bound states in quantum dots defined by an electric field in bilayer graphene. An external field is perpendicular to the bilayer and changes sign in a finite region that defines the quantum dot. The electric field opens a gap in the bilayer graphene, and the reversed field creates a domain wall with one-dimensional chiral gapless bands localized therein. The finite size of dots leads to the quantization of these bands and the appearance of discrete bound states localized at the dot boundary. We consider rectangular dots oriented along the armchair and zigzag directions. We go beyond a simple continuum one-valley model and use an atomistic tight-binding approach. This allows us to identify new effects related to the atomic structure of graphene, strengths of the electric field, valley mixing, and valley asymmetry.

AI.tldr: 研究双层石墨烯中由电场定义的量子点拓扑束缚态，电场在有限区域改变符号形成量子点，产生手性边界态，考虑矩形点取向、原子结构、谷混合等效应
AI.motivation: 研究双层石墨烯中电场定义量子点的拓扑束缚态特性，超越简单的连续单谷模型，考虑原子结构、电场强度、谷混合和谷不对称性等实际效应
AI.method: 使用原子紧束缚方法研究矩形量子点（沿扶手椅和锯齿方向），超越连续单谷模型，考虑原子结构、电场强度、谷混合和谷不对称性
AI.result: 电场在双层石墨烯中打开能隙，反向电场形成畴壁并产生一维手性无隙带，量子点有限尺寸导致这些带量子化，在边界出现离散束缚态
AI.conclusion: 双层石墨烯电场定义量子点中存在拓扑束缚态，原子结构、电场强度、谷混合和谷不对称性等效应显著影响束缚态特性，需要超越简单连续模型

title: SU(2) gauge theory of fluctuating stripe order in the two-dimensional Hubbard model
summary: We present an SU(2) gauge theory of fluctuating stripe order in the two-dimensional Hubbard model. The theory is based on a fractionalization of the electron operators in fermionic chargons with a pseudospin degree of freedom, and charge neutral spinons capturing fluctuations of the spin orientation. The chargons are treated in a renormalized mean-field theory. We focus on regions of the phase diagram where they undergo stripe order. The spinons are described by a non-linear sigma model with pseudospin stiffnesses determined by the chargons. They prevent breaking of the physical SU(2) spin symmetry at any finite temperature, resulting in a charge ordered pseudogap phase with a reconstructed Fermi surface and a spin gap. The spectral function for single-particle excitations exhibits a collection of Fermi arcs and other structures. The arcs appear in various regions of the Brillouin zone, but never exclusively around the Brillouin zone diagonals.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种描述二维Hubbard模型中条纹序涨落的SU(2)规范理论，通过电子算符分馏为赝自旋费米子电荷子和中性自旋子，解释了电荷有序赝隙相的特征。
AI.motivation: 研究二维Hubbard模型中的条纹序涨落现象，解释在有限温度下物理SU(2)自旋对称性不被破坏的情况下，如何形成电荷有序的赝隙相，并理解费米弧等实验观测特征。
AI.method: 采用SU(2)规范理论框架，将电子算符分馏为具有赝自旋自由度的费米子电荷子和中性自旋子。电荷子通过重整化平均场理论处理，在条纹序区域研究；自旋子用非线性σ模型描述，其赝自旋刚度由电荷子决定。
AI.result: 理论预测了一个电荷有序的赝隙相，具有重构的费米面和自旋能隙。单粒子激发谱函数显示出费米弧和其他结构，费米弧出现在布里渊区的不同区域，但从不只围绕布里渊区对角线。
AI.conclusion: 该SU(2)规范理论成功描述了二维Hubbard模型中条纹序涨落导致的电荷有序赝隙相，解释了费米弧等实验观测特征，为理解高温超导材料中的异常相提供了理论框架。

title: Rate-Dependent Reversibility and Lithium Losses in Hybrid Anode-Collector Metal Electrodes
summary: Understanding how practical lithium storage capacity varies with charge-discharge rate is crucial for designing durable anode free lithium batteries. We examine the lithiation behavior of single element metal electrodes-Al (alloying), Mg (solid solution intercalation), Ag (solid solution then alloying), and Cu (surface Li plating)-to determine how their mechanisms influence reversibility, measured by coulombic efficiency. Using electrochemistry combined with depth resolved ion beam profiling, we map local coulombic efficiency across current densities and identify dominant lithium loss pathways. Ag uniquely sustains fast kinetics and high reversibility at elevated rates due to rapid formation of gamma brass-type alloy phases. In contrast, Mg and Al show increasing irreversibility from kinetically or structurally driven Li trapping, while Cu exhibits the largest losses through porous, highly reactive plated lithium. These results reveal fundamental limits of anode free systems that depend on reversible Li plating without excess lithium and underscore the importance of metal selection for stable, high rate performance.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析不同金属电极（Al、Mg、Ag、Cu）的锂化行为，揭示了阳极无锂电池中锂存储容量随充放电速率变化的机制，发现Ag因快速形成γ黄铜型合金相而具有最佳的高速率可逆性。
AI.motivation: 理解实际锂存储容量如何随充放电速率变化对于设计耐用的阳极无锂电池至关重要。阳极无锂电池依赖于可逆的锂电镀而不需要过量锂，因此需要研究不同金属电极的锂化机制如何影响可逆性。
AI.method: 研究采用电化学方法结合深度分辨离子束剖面分析，分析了四种单元素金属电极：Al（合金化）、Mg（固溶体插层）、Ag（先固溶体后合金化）和Cu（表面锂电镀）。通过映射局部库仑效率随电流密度的变化，识别了主要的锂损失途径。
AI.result: Ag电极在高速率下表现出优异的动力学和可逆性，这归因于快速形成的γ黄铜型合金相。相比之下，Mg和Al由于动力学或结构驱动的锂捕获而显示出增加的不逆性，而Cu则通过多孔、高反应性的电镀锂表现出最大的锂损失。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了依赖于可逆锂电镀而不需要过量锂的阳极无锂系统的基本限制，并强调了金属选择对于实现稳定、高速率性能的重要性。Ag电极因其独特的合金化机制而展现出最佳的高速率性能。

title: Band offsets in InP/ZnSe nanocrystals evaluated using two-photon transitions analysis
summary: We present a semi-analytical theoretical kp-study of the energy structure and optical transitions in spherical core-shell InP/ZnSe nanocrystals. We use the eight-band Kane model and the six-band Luttinger Hamiltonian in the spherical approximation to calculate the electron and hole energy spectra, respectively. The influence of the Coulomb interaction is considered perturbatively. The one- and two-photon absorption spectra are calculated as functions of the band offsets between the InP core and ZnSe shell. Exciton states responsible for the main features in the two-photon absorption spectra of InP/ZnSe nanocrystals are identified and the spectral dependence of the linear-circular dichroism signal is predicted. We show that in the presence of inhomogeneous broadening, the transition to the ground two-photon-active exciton state can be hidden behind intense transitions to higher-lying states. A comparison of the calculated one- and two-photon absorption spectra with the available experimental data shows that, depending on the lattice strain in the InP core, the range of possible valence band offsets is 0.85-1 eV. The determined range exceeds the natural valence band offset of 0.57 eV and indicates the presence of electric dipoles formed by the preferential Zn-P bonds at the InP/ZnSe heterointerface.

AI.tldr: 对InP/ZnSe核壳纳米晶进行半解析理论kp研究，分析其能带结构和光学跃迁，预测线性-圆二色性信号，确定价带偏移范围为0.85-1 eV
AI.motivation: 研究球形核壳InP/ZnSe纳米晶的电子结构和光学性质，特别是两光子吸收谱中的激子态，以及异质界面处的能带偏移和应变效应
AI.method: 采用八带Kane模型计算电子能谱，六带Luttinger哈密顿量（球近似）计算空穴能谱，微扰处理库仑相互作用，计算一光子和两光子吸收谱
AI.result: 确定了InP/ZnSe纳米晶的价带偏移范围为0.85-1 eV，超过自然偏移0.57 eV，表明异质界面存在由Zn-P键优先形成的电偶极子；预测了线性-圆二色性信号的谱依赖关系
AI.conclusion: InP/ZnSe核壳纳米晶的价带偏移受晶格应变影响，范围在0.85-1 eV之间，异质界面存在电偶极子；非均匀展宽下，基态两光子活性激子跃迁可能被更高能态跃迁掩盖

title: Zinc selenide single crystals co-doped with active TM-ions of chromium, cobalt and iron
summary: The development of laser materials with absorption/emission spectra in the atmospheric transparency band 2-5 microns is of great interest for modern applications. Triple-doped zinc selenide crystals activated with chromium, cobalt, and iron ions were grown by the vertical Bridgman method under high argon pressure. Comparative X-ray diffractometry, infra-red spectroscopy, and other studies of grown crystals were conducted. Features of their growth, morphology, and optical properties related to the crystal structure were discovered.

AI.tldr: 通过垂直布里奇曼法在高压氩气下生长了铬、钴、铁三掺杂硒化锌晶体，研究了其在2-5微米大气透明波段的吸收/发射特性
AI.motivation: 开发在2-5微米大气透明波段具有吸收/发射光谱的激光材料对现代应用具有重要意义
AI.method: 采用垂直布里奇曼法在高压氩气条件下生长铬、钴、铁三掺杂的硒化锌晶体，并进行X射线衍射、红外光谱等比较研究
AI.result: 发现了与晶体结构相关的生长、形态和光学特性特征
AI.conclusion: 成功制备了三掺杂硒化锌晶体，并揭示了其结构-性能关系，为2-5微米波段激光材料开发提供了基础

title: Nested Feature Spectrum Topology: Tripartite Topological Equivalence of Feature, Entanglement, and Wilson Loop Spectrum
summary: Topological phases of matter are traditionally characterized through symmetry-based classifications. In cases of symmetry breaking, the projected spectrum - obtained by projecting the ground state onto the eigenstates of a pertinent quantum observable, such as spin or orbital angular momentum - provides a clear method for classifying topological phases. This approach underpins well-known frameworks such as spin-resolved topology and feature spectrum topology. Here we introduce nested feature spectrum topology, in which projection operators are applied recursively to subsectors of the feature spectrum, generating a hierarchy of feature spectra. We uncover a fundamental tripartite equivalence among the topology of feature, the entanglement, and the Wilson loop spectra in non-interacting fermionic systems. This equivalence reveals that the feature spectrum encodes the entanglement between sectors of the quantum observable, such as the spin-up and spin-down states in spin-resolved topology. We further prove that spectral flow in the entanglement spectrum and the Wilson loop winding in the feature spectrum are equivalent manifestations of the feature-energy complementarity: the appearance of gapless spectral flow in either energy or projected spectra on the boundary. This complementarity refines the conventional bulk-boundary correspondence by demonstrating that topological boundary modes may persist in the feature spectrum even when energy spectra are gapped. Our results provide a deeper understanding and solid foundation for the origin of band topology in the feature spectrum.

AI.tldr: 提出嵌套特征谱拓扑，通过递归投影算子构建特征谱层次结构，揭示特征谱拓扑、纠缠谱和Wilson环谱之间的三重等价关系，完善了体边对应关系。
AI.motivation: 传统拓扑相分类基于对称性，但在对称性破缺时，特征谱（将基态投影到量子可观测量本征态上）提供了清晰的拓扑相分类方法。本文旨在深入理解特征谱拓扑的起源，并完善体边对应关系。
AI.method: 引入嵌套特征谱拓扑，递归应用投影算子到特征谱的子扇区，构建特征谱层次结构。在非相互作用费米子系统中，建立特征谱拓扑、纠缠谱和Wilson环谱之间的三重等价关系。
AI.result: 发现特征谱编码了量子可观测量扇区之间的纠缠（如自旋上下态）。证明了纠缠谱中的谱流和特征谱中Wilson环绕数是特征-能量互补性的等价表现，表明即使在能谱有隙时，特征谱中仍可能存在拓扑边界模。
AI.conclusion: 嵌套特征谱拓扑为特征谱中的能带拓扑起源提供了更深入的理解和坚实基础，完善了传统体边对应关系，揭示了特征谱拓扑与纠缠之间的深刻联系。

title: Two-channel physics in a lightly doped antiferromagnetic Mott insulator revealed by two-hole spectroscopy
summary: Understanding pairing in the strong-coupling regime of doped Mott insulators remains an open problem in the context of cuprate superconductors. We perform ultra-high resolution numerical simulations of spectral functions in the highly underdoped $t-J$ model and discover two coupled branches of hole pairs emerging at low energies in the largely unexplored two-particle spectrum. As spin anisotropy is tuned from the Ising limit to the $SU(2)$-symmetric Heisenberg regime, the lowest $d$-wave pair evolves from a single bipolaronic branch into two hybridized branches separated by an avoided crossing. We explain this behaviour using an effective two-channel model involving a tightly bound bipolaronic state and a second channel associated with two magnetic polarons. The model reproduces the qualitative low-energy spectra and implies near-resonant $d$-wave interactions in the $SU(2)$-symmetric $t-J$ model, consistent with proximity to an emergent Feshbach-type resonance. To probe these predictions experimentally, we propose a Raman spectroscopy scheme for the attractive Hubbard model that can be directly implemented using ultracold atoms in optical lattices. Our work establishes two-particle spectroscopy, beyond single-particle Green's functions, as a powerful tool for revealing the microscopic origins of unconventional superconductivity.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过超高分辨率数值模拟，在强耦合掺杂莫特绝缘体的t-J模型中发现了低能区存在两个耦合的空穴对分支，揭示了d波配对的微观机制，并提出可通过冷原子实验验证。
AI.motivation: 理解掺杂莫特绝缘体强耦合区域中的配对机制是铜氧化物超导体研究中的开放性问题。传统单粒子谱函数方法难以揭示配对微观起源，需要发展新的多粒子谱学方法。
AI.method: 采用超高分辨率数值模拟研究高度欠掺杂t-J模型的谱函数，分析两粒子谱中的低能激发。通过调节自旋各向异性从Ising极限到SU(2)对称海森堡区域，观察配对分支演化。建立有效双通道模型解释观测现象。
AI.result: 发现低能区存在两个耦合的空穴对分支。在SU(2)对称极限下，最低d波对从单双极化子分支演化为两个通过避免交叉分离的杂化分支。有效双通道模型成功再现低能谱特征，表明t-J模型中存在近共振d波相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 两粒子谱学超越传统单粒子格林函数，成为揭示非常规超导微观起源的有力工具。提出的拉曼光谱方案可通过光学晶格中的超冷原子实验直接验证预测，为理解强关联系统中的配对机制开辟新途径。

title: Microscopic flexoelectricity in the canonical PMN relaxor
summary: Previously reported neutron scattering investigations of the canonical relaxor ferroelectric perovskite oxide with a chemical formula Pb(Mg(1/3)Nb(2/3))O3 (PMN) are revisited in order to appreciate the role of the intrinsic bulk flexoelectricity. Despite the outstanding electromechanical properties of lead-based relaxors, the magnitude of the flexoelectric coupling coefficient derived here directly from the PMN neutron diffuse scattering data, does not exceed the range of values typical for conventional perovskite ferroelectrics. We explain how these findings are related in the framework of the Ginzburg-Landau-Devonshire and the ferroelectric soft mode theory. We propose that the relaxor properties of PMN might be related to the suppression of the transverse correlation length of the flexoelectrically hybridized translational-polarization fluctuations due to its closeness to the Lifshitz-point regime.

AI.tldr: 重新分析PMN弛豫铁电体的中子散射数据，发现其挠曲电耦合系数与常规钙钛矿铁电体相当，并提出弛豫特性可能与接近Lifshitz点导致横向关联长度被抑制有关。
AI.motivation: 重新审视PMN弛豫铁电体的中子散射研究，以评估本征体挠曲电性的作用，解释弛豫铁电体优异机电性能的微观机制。
AI.method: 重新分析PMN的中子漫散射数据，基于Ginzburg-Landau-Devonshire理论和铁电软模理论框架，推导挠曲电耦合系数。
AI.result: PMN的挠曲电耦合系数并未超过常规钙钛矿铁电体的典型范围，弛豫特性可能与接近Lifshitz点导致挠曲电混合的平移-极化涨落的横向关联长度被抑制有关。
AI.conclusion: PMN的弛豫特性可能源于接近Lifshitz点导致的横向关联长度抑制，而非挠曲电耦合的增强，这为理解弛豫铁电体的微观机制提供了新视角。

title: Inverse Faraday Effect in Rashba two-dimensional electron systems: interplay of spin and orbital effects
summary: The inverse Faraday effect (IFE) refers to the generation of a DC magnetization by circularly polarized light through the transfer of optical angular momentum to electronic degrees of freedom. In conducting systems, this response can arise from two microscopic channels - spin polarization of itinerant electrons and orbital magnetization generated by circulating charge currents. However, the orbital contribution to the inverse Faraday effect in spin-orbit-coupled conducting systems remains largely unexplored. We present a theoretical analysis of the IFE in disordered two-dimensional electron systems with Rashba spin-orbit coupling using both the quantum kinetic equation and Green's-function diagrammatics. We find that in a noninteracting Rashba metal the orbital magnetization is strongly modified by spin-orbit coupling and can become comparable to, or exceed, the spin magnetization for realistic parameter regimes. When the radiation frequency approaches the Rashba spin splitting, both spin and orbital magnetizations exhibit resonant enhancement. These results clarify the microscopic origin of light-induced magnetization and highlight the interplay of spin and orbital mechanisms in optically driven magnetization dynamics in low-dimensional electronic systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有Rashba自旋轨道耦合的二维电子系统中逆法拉第效应的轨道磁化贡献，发现轨道磁化可达到或超过自旋磁化，并在辐射频率接近Rashba分裂时出现共振增强。
AI.motivation: 在自旋轨道耦合的导电系统中，逆法拉第效应的轨道贡献尚未得到充分探索。传统上主要关注自旋极化机制，但轨道磁化在低维电子系统中可能发挥重要作用。
AI.method: 使用量子动力学方程和格林函数图解法，对具有Rashba自旋轨道耦合的无序二维电子系统进行理论分析。
AI.result: 在非相互作用Rashba金属中，轨道磁化受自旋轨道耦合强烈影响，在现实参数范围内可达到或超过自旋磁化。当辐射频率接近Rashba自旋分裂时，自旋和轨道磁化均表现出共振增强。
AI.conclusion: 研究阐明了光致磁化的微观起源，强调了在低维电子系统中自旋和轨道机制在光驱动磁化动力学中的相互作用，为理解逆法拉第效应提供了新视角。

title: A Spatial Localizer for Electrons in Insulators
summary: The location of electrons governs phenomena ranging from chemical bonding and electric polarization to the topological classification of band insulators and the emergence of correlated states in quantum matter. While a prescription exists for finding local state representations of electrons in one-dimensional insulators, no comparably general theory exists in higher dimensions. Here, we introduce a general framework for finding the location of electrons in insulators in two and three dimensions based on the spectral properties of quantum-mechanical operators that we term Spatial Localizers. This framework naturally extends the notion of Wannier centers to insulators with boundaries, defects, and disorder, which we use to establish a position-space formulation of the bulk-defect correspondence for electronic charge. This framework also yields maximally localized electronic states. As two representative examples, we show that these states reduce to maximally localized Wannier functions in atomic insulators, whereas in Chern insulators they form coherent states that mirror the coherent-state structure of Landau levels in the quantum Hall effect.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于空间局域化算子的通用框架，用于确定二维和三维绝缘体中电子的位置，将Wannier中心概念扩展到有边界、缺陷和紊乱的系统，并建立了体-缺陷对应的位置空间表述。
AI.motivation: 虽然一维绝缘体中存在寻找电子局域态表示的处方，但在更高维度缺乏可比拟的通用理论。电子位置决定了从化学键合、电极化到拓扑能带绝缘体分类和量子物质中关联态出现等各种现象。
AI.method: 引入基于空间局域化算子谱性质的一般框架，这些算子称为空间局域化算子。该框架自然地将Wannier中心概念扩展到具有边界、缺陷和紊乱的绝缘体。
AI.result: 建立了电子电荷的体-缺陷对应的位置空间表述，并得到了最大局域化的电子态。在原子绝缘体中，这些态简化为最大局域化的Wannier函数；在陈绝缘体中，它们形成相干态，反映了量子霍尔效应中朗道能级的相干态结构。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个通用框架，用于确定二维和三维绝缘体中电子的位置，统一处理了从原子绝缘体到拓扑绝缘体的各种系统，并建立了体-缺陷对应的位置空间表述。

title: First-principles predictions of band alignment in strained Si/Si1-xGex and Ge/Si1-xGex heterostructures
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures. Prepared for submission to Applied Physics Letters
summary: Accurate band offsets are essential for predictive continuum modeling of nanostructures such as quantum wells and quantum dots formed in strained Si/Si1-xGex and Ge/Si1-xGex heterostructures. Experimental offset data for these systems remain sparse away from endpoint compositions, making composition-dependent design difficult. We use atomistic first-principles density functional theory to compute valence- and conduction-band offsets across the full range 0 <= x <= 1. Random alloying is treated with special quasirandom structures, interface lineup terms are extracted from macroscopically averaged local Kohn-Sham potentials in thick periodic superlattices, valence-band spin-orbit coupling is included through species-resolved Mulliken weights, and conduction-band edges are refined using the screened hybrid Heyd-Scuseria-Ernzerhof functional. The resulting offsets show pronounced composition nonlinearity beyond the linear models explored in previous works, agree with experimental benchmarks, and reproduce the high-Ge slope change in the relaxed-alloy band gap. Analytic fitting expressions are provided for direct use in simulations, facilitating practical design of modern quantum technology devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算获得了Si/Si1-xGex和Ge/Si1-xGex异质结构在整个成分范围（0≤x≤1）内的精确价带和导带偏移，提供了非线性拟合表达式，便于量子技术器件的实际设计。
AI.motivation: 精确的能带偏移对于预测性连续介质建模量子阱和量子点等纳米结构至关重要。然而，对于Si/Si1-xGex和Ge/Si1-xGex异质结构系统，远离端点成分的实验偏移数据仍然稀少，使得成分依赖性设计变得困难。
AI.method: 采用原子尺度第一性原理密度泛函理论计算；使用特殊准随机结构处理随机合金化；从厚周期超晶格中宏观平均的局部Kohn-Sham势提取界面排列项；通过物种分辨的Mulliken权重包含价带自旋轨道耦合；使用筛选杂化Heyd-Scuseria-Ernzerhof泛函精化导带边缘。
AI.result: 计算得到的偏移显示出明显的成分非线性，超越了先前工作中的线性模型，与实验基准相符，并再现了弛豫合金带隙中高Ge斜率变化。提供了可直接用于模拟的解析拟合表达式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为Si/Si1-xGex和Ge/Si1-xGex异质结构提供了精确的成分依赖性能带偏移，促进了现代量子技术器件的实际设计，解决了实验数据稀疏的问题。

title: Electromechanical Hysteresis in Phase Change Material Sb2S3
comment: 30 pages total including 3 pages of Supporting Information
summary: Antimony sulfide is an emerging phase change material for optical and electrical memory and computation elements. It has additionally been reported as a ferroelectric, with recent evidence from hysteresis in piezoresponse force microscopy. Here, we complete a rigorous set of piezoresponse force microscopy experiments on a congruently crystallized Sb2S3 glass-ceramic, where piezoelectric coupling should be forbidden in glassy Sb2S3. We replicate previous results and reveal that the behavior is absent in glassy Sb2S3 but show that the response originates primarily from non-piezoelectric contributions to the signal caused by an applied voltage. This hysteretic behavior in piezoresponse force microscopy is quite similar to some electrochemically active non-ferroelectric oxides, but uniquely, it appears here with a very clear spatial contrast that is decoupled from surface topography. This shows that the electromechanical signal reflects bulk-like properties and reveals differences in electrical behavior of crystalline and amorphous phases of Sb2S3.

AI.tldr: 锑硫化物(Sb2S3)的压电力显微镜信号并非源自铁电性，而是非压电贡献，该信号在晶体和玻璃相中表现出明显差异。
AI.motivation: 锑硫化物作为新兴相变材料，曾被报道具有铁电性，但这一结论基于压电力显微镜中的迟滞现象，需要更严谨的实验验证。
AI.method: 对同成分结晶的Sb2S3玻璃陶瓷进行系统的压电力显微镜实验，比较玻璃相和晶体相的响应，分析电压应用引起的非压电信号贡献。
AI.result: 玻璃相Sb2S3中不存在压电响应，而晶体相中的迟滞行为主要来自非压电贡献；信号具有清晰的空间对比度，与表面形貌解耦，反映了体相性质差异。
AI.conclusion: Sb2S3的压电力显微镜信号并非铁电性证据，而是电压引起的非压电效应，揭示了晶体和玻璃相在电学行为上的本质差异。

title: Magnetotransport in the presence of real and momentum space topology
summary: We investigate magnetotransport in a time-reversal symmetry-broken, untilted Weyl semimetal in the simultaneous presence of momentum-space Berry curvature and real-space topology arising from a skyrmion-induced emergent magnetic field $\mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{emer}}$. Using a semiclassical Boltzmann approach incorporating Berry-curvature corrections and intervalley scattering, we analyze the longitudinal magnetoconductivity and planar Hall conductivity in this mixed-topology regime. In the absence of $B_{\mathrm{emer}}$, increasing intervalley scattering drives a strong sign reversal of the longitudinal magnetoconductivity. A finite $\mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{emer}}$ introduces an additional shift of the parabolic magnetic-field dependence, leading to a weak sign-reversal regime without altering the curvature. The coexistence of these effects naturally produces a strong-and-weak sign-reversal regime, demonstrating that intervalley scattering and real-space topology control distinct geometric features of the response. The emergent field further induces asymmetry in the angular dependence of both longitudinal and planar Hall conductivities. We show that a finite planar Hall response can arise solely from $\mathbf{B}_{\mathrm{emer}}$ when its direction is varied, providing a transport signature of real-space topology. Our results establish that the skyrmion-induced emergent field acts as an independent topological tuning parameter, revealing measurable consequences of the interplay between real- and momentum-space Berry curvature in Weyl systems.

AI.tldr: 研究时间反演对称性破缺、无倾斜外尔半金属中，动量空间贝里曲率与实空间拓扑（斯格明子诱导的涌现磁场）共存时的磁输运特性，发现两种拓扑效应产生不同的几何响应特征。
AI.motivation: 探索外尔半金属中动量空间贝里曲率与实空间拓扑（斯格明子诱导的涌现磁场）同时存在时的相互作用，理解这种混合拓扑体系中的磁输运特性。
AI.method: 采用包含贝里曲率修正和谷间散射的半经典玻尔兹曼方法，分析纵向磁导率和平面霍尔电导率在混合拓扑区域的行为。
AI.result: 1) 无涌现磁场时，增加谷间散射导致纵向磁导率发生强符号反转；2) 有限涌现磁场引入抛物线磁场依赖关系的额外偏移，产生弱符号反转区域而不改变曲率；3) 两种效应共存产生强弱符号反转区域；4) 涌现磁场导致纵向和平面霍尔电导率角依赖关系不对称；5) 仅通过改变涌现磁场方向即可产生有限平面霍尔响应。
AI.conclusion: 斯格明子诱导的涌现磁场作为独立的拓扑调控参数，揭示了外尔系统中实空间与动量空间贝里曲率相互作用的可测量后果，为探测实空间拓扑提供了输运特征。
